codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: reusable animation primitives are exported from src/components/ui/animations.tsx, include scroll-triggered fade-in, staggered list behavior (100ms child delay), card hover lift/shadow effect, Apple easing [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1], and reduced-motion handling. The committed demo wiring and tests are consistent with expected behavior, and no correctness issues were identified in the reviewed diff.

summary: Reviewed worker session d5378292-ab6d-4801-a78f-cbc45244d1a8 and commit 3d2e1ae for foundation-animations. The delivered code satisfies the feature description and expected behavior with no blocking or non-blocking defects found.
